title: PM Kulbergs rates his cabinet '7 out of 10' after first month in office
summary_full: The government of Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs (United List) has fully completed three of a total of 61 priority tasks within a month, he announced at a press conference after a meeting to discuss the government's actions so far.
